description: A designed announcement graphic. The upper portion is a color photograph in the Oval Office: a bearded man in a dark suit stands beside the Resolute Desk while a man with white-gray hair in a dark suit sits at the desk, both smiling, with American and military flags and a window behind them. Across the lower portion, white text on a red banner reads 'CONFIRMED Markwayne Mullin as Secretary of DHS', above a small 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark.
notable_text: CONFIRMED; Markwayne Mullin as Secretary of DHS; The WHITE HOUSE
